---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for Lancer
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## What problem does this solve?

A clear description of the user problem. Avoid jumping to a solution — describe the pain.

## Your proposed solution

How you'd like it to work.

## Alternatives you've considered

Have you used another tool that does this? How does it work there?

## Scope check

- Does this fit Phase 1 (free core), Phase 2 (Pro), or beyond? (See [ROADMAP.md](https://github.com/USERNAME/lancer/blob/main/ROADMAP.md))
- Is it something Lancer should do on the user's machine, or would it require us to run a server? (Note: we never run servers.)

## Anything else?

Sketches, mockups, links to similar features in other tools.
